title: Middle East Mayhem
summary:
Main
The first week of the US-Israel military campaign against Iran has drawn to a close, but what happens in the weeks to come remains extremely uncertain. The war has triggered a global energy shipping crisis of epic proportions, with cascading effects across oil markets, tanker freight, and petrochemical supply chains. The most critical issue is the inability for ships to safely transit the Straits of Hormuz, and until this issue is resolved, commodity trade in and out of the Middle East Gulf remains paralysed.
